iterations.reason: 夜间低负载场景增加早回正策略

papers.title: Lithium-ion battery internal resistance evolution under fast charging cycles
papers.summary: 建立 SEI 膜生长模型, 提出基于内阻预测 SOH 的 0.3mΩ 阈值方法

papers.title: Active cell balancing control strategy based on multi-agent reinforcement learning
papers.summary: 多智能体强化学习优化均衡电流分配, 提升 24% 收敛速度

papers.title: Adaptive CRAC control in data centers using digital twin and model predictive control
papers.summary: 数字孪生 + MPC 实现 PUE 1.28, 节能 18%

papers.title: Hot aisle containment effectiveness: a CFD meta-analysis
papers.summary: 热通道封闭能降低进回风温差 4-6℃, 推荐 F3 区域优先实施

papers.title: False alarm suppression for aspirating smoke detectors using deep learning
papers.summary: 基于 LSTM 的灰尘/烟雾分类, 误报率从 22% 降至 6%

papers.title: Data-driven chiller sequencing optimization in data centers
papers.summary: 多目标遗传算法优化冷机开启数, COP 提升 11%

papers.title: Tailgating detection in access control using depth-camera and gait analysis
papers.summary: 步态分析 + 深度视觉, 准确率 94%, 已应用于工业门禁
